falsification_rule_text:
PRIMARY (dispositive, requires data not yet on disk): the hypothesis is SUPPORTED if (i) mean log industrial electricity price 2010-2024 in the phase-out cohort (DEU, BEL, CHE) exceeds the retain cohort (FRA, FIN, SWE, USA, GBR) by at least 0.08 log-points (~8.3%) AND (ii) wholesale day-ahead volatility CoV is higher in phase-out cohort by at least 20% AND (iii) the effect survives a drop-2021-2024 sensitivity that excludes the gas shock. REFUTED if any one of (i)-(iii) flips sign with confident methodology. Method-validity failure (data gap, FRA 2022 availability shock not handled, pre-trend RMSPE > 0.5×post-RMSPE in synth control) yields INCONCLUSIVE not refuted.
SURROGATE (testable today on OWID-Ember data): mean change in fossil share of electricity 2005→2024 in phase-out cohort minus retain cohort. The hypothesis predicts a positive gap (phase-out countries leaned harder on fossils for back-up). Surrogate- supports threshold = +5pp gap. Surrogate is informative-only — it does NOT settle the cost or volatility primaries.

variables_missing.name: log_industrial_electricity_price_usd_mwh
variables_missing.source: constructed: IEA industrial electricity price (band IC, medium industry) + Eurostat NRG_PC_205 cross-check, USD/MWh constant 2020. Specialist IEA fetcher pending.

variables_missing.name: wholesale_price_volatility
variables_missing.source: constructed: annual coefficient of variation of day-ahead wholesale electricity prices (EPEX, Nord Pool, ENTSO-E transparency platform). Fetcher pending.

variables_missing.name: fossil_backup_capacity_factor
variables_missing.source: constructed: ENTSO-E + EIA annual capacity factor of fossil-fired (gas + coal) plants, as proxy for back-up reliance. Fetcher pending.

variables_missing.name: loss_of_load_expectation_hours
variables_missing.source: constructed: ENTSO-E MAF / NERC equivalent reserve-adequacy indicator; interpolation required across non-harmonised reporting. Fetcher pending and difficult.

variables_missing.name: nuclear_phaseout_legislated_dummy
variables_missing.source: constructed: indicator = 1 in years after a country legislated a binding nuclear phase-out. DEU 2011+, BEL 2003+ (law), CHE 2017+ (referendum). USA, FRA, FIN, SWE, KOR, JPN = 0 (nuclear-retaining, though JPN has post-Fukushima effective pause — excluded for cleanness or coded as 'partial' in sensitivity).

variables_missing.name: nuclear_capacity_share_change
variables_missing.source: constructed: year-over-year change in nuclear share of electricity generation, BP Statistical Review / IEA electricity statistics. Continuous treatment intensity.

variables_missing.name: gas_price_eu_ttf_proxy
variables_missing.source: constructed: TTF-equivalent natural gas price (EUR/MWh) to partial out gas-shock exposure common to gas-indexed markets. Fetcher pending.

variables_missing.name: renewable_capacity_share
variables_missing.source: constructed: IEA / IRENA wind + solar share of installed capacity. Fetcher pending.

variables_missing.name: interconnection_capacity_per_capita
variables_missing.source: constructed: ENTSO-E interconnection NTC / population. Fetcher pending.
